creator: jw@innerewut.de
text:
Please do not use this patch as it does not update the pkg-plist.

Please see my PR for a complete solution:

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=118658

Jonathan

Edwin Groothuis schrieb:
> Maintainer of devel/ruby-gems,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/118708 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/118708
> 


-- 
Jonathan Weiss
